session.user: Run ruff on the changed files and report results. Command: ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_helpers.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/real.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/fake.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/dry_run.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/printing.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/fake.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py
session.assistant: I'll run ruff on the changed files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting on changed files

session.assistant:
**ruff passed:** All linting checks passed
All 9 changed files have passed ruff linting with no violations: - src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_helpers.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/abc.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/real.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/fake.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/dry_run.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/printing.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/fake.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py
